etymology_and_history.root_language: Language**: From "rejection" from Latin "rejectionem" (act of throwing back)
etymology_and_history.original_meaning: Meaning**: Act throwing back; experiencing act refusing and rejection act supported by healing awareness
etymology_and_history.semantic_evolution: Evolution**: Act throwing → act refusing → contemporary rejection act and rejection refusing that benefits from recovery growth
etymology_and_history.cultural_shifts: Shifts**: Act throwing → act refusing → rejection act → recovery understanding
